expectations.text: Organizes output into the 5 canonical buckets (pain points, trigger moments, objections, transformations, standout language)
expectations.evidence: Labeled BUCKET 1 PAIN POINTS, BUCKET 2 TRIGGER MOMENTS, BUCKET 3 OBJECTIONS, BUCKET 4 TRANSFORMATIONS, BUCKET 5 STANDOUT LANGUAGE

expectations.text: References scoring reviews 1-5 for quality before analysis
expectations.evidence: States '5 of 6 reviews score 4-5' and tags Review #3 as scored 2 up front

expectations.text: Surfaces actual quotes from reviews (not just summary)
expectations.evidence: Bucket 5 has 9 exact pulled quotes including 'Not toned - strong' and 'walk into my gym like I own it'

expectations.text: Surfaces exact customer phrases as standout language (e.g. 'strong not toned', 'stupid how proud I am')
expectations.evidence: Pulls exact phrases 'Not toned - strong' and 'stupid how proud I am' in Bucket 5

expectations.text: Names specific transformation moments (groceries in one trip, walking into gym like I own it)
expectations.evidence: Bucket 4 'Ownership of physical space' names groceries-in-one-trip and walking into gyms transformation moments

expectations.text: Captures objections to what OTHER products do (postpartum framing, 'you got this girl', 25-year-old audience)
expectations.evidence: Bucket 1 'Infantilized by fitness industry' names postpartum framing, 'you got this girl' bubbliness, and youth-coded aesthetics
